title: Emotecraft x Easy NPC
body:
Emotecraft x EasyNPC adds Emotecraft animation support to EasyNPC humanoid and player-like NPCs, letting you play emotes directly on NPCs through commands.

This mod supports both normal and slim player models, including emotes with limb bends, and also improves command usability by showing cleaner emote names. If you use compatible translation resource packs, translated emote names can also appear in command suggestions and loaded emote lists.

Perfect for servers, roleplay, cutscenes, lobbies, and animated NPC interactions.



-- COMMANDS --

/enpcemote play <target> <emote> [max_ticks]
Plays an emote on the target NPC.

/enpcemote stop <target>
Stops the current emote on the target NPC.

/enpcemote listloaded
Shows the Emotecraft emotes currently loaded and synced from your client.

Notes

- The target must be a humanoid/player-like EasyNPC entity.
- Command suggestions are based on the Emotecraft emotes loaded on your client.
- If translated emote resource packs are installed, nicer translated names may appear in the command list.
- If listloaded is empty, rejoin the world so the client can sync its loaded emotes again.
